description: Programmatically extract raw waveform data from the SeisComP Data Structure (SDS) archive (URI: sdsarchive:///home/ga/seiscomp/var/lib/archive). Create a CSV file named '~/toli_waveform.csv' containing 60 seconds of waveform data from station GE.TOLI (Network: GE, Station: TOLI, Channel: BHZ), starting at the earthquake origin time: 2024-01-01 07:10:09 UTC. The resulting CSV must have the header 'Time_UTC,Amplitude_Counts' with each row containing the ISO8601 timestamp and the integer amplitude count for that sample.
